headline: Evercore ISI Group Initiates Coverage On Carrier Global with Outperform Rating, Announces Price Target of $75
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Alexander Virgo   initiates coverage on Carrier Global (NYSE:CARR) with a Outperform rating and announces Price Target of $75.
